title: Move item to a specific board based on the specific person allocated in people column

posts.author: andyoungy (Andy Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am looking to set up an automation but not sure if possible. I need to use the people column to trigger a move to a specific board, based on a specific person added. I need:

When Person 1 is added, move the item to Person 1 Board.

But at the moment I can only see how to trigger a move when ‘somebody’ is added, which could be anyone!

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @andyoungy !

You can create and automation for the task you are describing like this :

image1218×431 15.7 KB

Essentially you create an extra condition to check which person is getting assigned. For different people you would have to duplicate the automation and change the assignee.

To add an extra condition :

image1258×383 10.2 KB

image1015×456 33.2 KB

Let me know if this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
